experiment_metadata.title: VulnForge LLM Strategy Evaluation
experiment_metadata.note: Findings are curated examples (not from live scans). Metrics are from real DeepSeek API calls.

dataset.description: 72 curated vulnerability findings with human-assigned ground truth labels. 6 vulnerability types, perfectly balanced TP/FP per type.

findings.desc: Error-based SQL injection in cat parameter
findings.evidence: GET /products.php?cat=1%27 200 OK...MySQL Error: You have an error in your SQL syntax

findings.desc: Time-based blind SQL injection in username
findings.evidence: POST /login.php...username=admin%27+AND+SLEEP(5)--&password=test...Response time: 5.2s

findings.desc: Union-based SQL injection in id parameter
findings.evidence: GET /artists.php?id=1+UNION+SELECT+1,2,3,4,5...200 OK...Numbers 1,2,3,4,5 in output

findings.desc: Stacked query SQL injection in artist parameter
findings.evidence: GET /listproducts.php?artist=1;DROP+TABLE+users--...200 OK...Table users dropped confirmed

findings.desc: Boolean blind SQL injection in id parameter
findings.evidence: GET /categories.php?id=2+AND+1=1...200 OK (normal) vs id=2+AND+1=2...empty response

findings.desc: Out-of-band SQL injection via DNS lookup
findings.evidence: GET /product.php?pid=5;exec+master..xp_dirtree...DNS lookup to attacker-controlled domain detected

findings.desc: Error-based SQLi in search parameter
findings.evidence: GET /search.php?q=test%27...500...MySQL error in search query parameter

findings.desc: Second-order SQL injection via stored data
findings.evidence: POST /review.php...review text stored...GET /artist.php?id=3 loads review into query without escaping

findings.desc: Possible SQLi - generic error page detected
findings.evidence: GET /search.php?q=hello%27...500 Error...App Error page, no SQL error messages in response

findings.desc: Possible SQLi - parameter dynamic behavior
findings.evidence: GET /products?id=456+AND+1=2...different content but no DB errors, template-based rendering

findings.desc: SQL warning pattern in user comment
findings.evidence: GET /posts?page=2%27...SQL command not properly ended found in user comment text, not system error

findings.desc: Numeric ID reflected in URL without SQL connection
findings.evidence: GET /article?id=101+AND+1=1...same response...static HTML file, no database backend

findings.desc: URL-encoded quotes in username parameter
findings.evidence: GET /profile?user=admin%27--...200 OK...Quote encoded by WAF, parameter sanitized before DB query

findings.desc: SQL-like error message from application
findings.evidence: GET /apply?id=55%27...500...Error: SQLSTATE[42000] in log but app uses prepared statements, error from instrumentation

findings.desc: Order ID parameter with quote reflection
findings.evidence: GET /order?id=42%27...200...Single quote reflected back in JSON error wrapper, not executed in DB context

findings.desc: Timing variation in page parameter
findings.evidence: GET /page?title=Main_Page%27+SLEEP(5)...6.2s...Cache miss caused delay, not SQL execution

findings.desc: Reflected XSS - unescaped script tag
findings.evidence: GET /search.php?test=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...Response reflects unencoded <script> in HTML context

findings.desc: Stored XSS via comment submission
findings.evidence: POST /guestbook.php...name=<script>alert(1)</script>...Next page load shows unescaped tag in comments

findings.desc: DOM-based XSS via hash fragment
findings.evidence: GET /search.php#<img+src=x+onerror=alert(1)>...client-side JS reads location.hash into innerHTML unsafely

findings.desc: XSS via javascript: URL in redirect parameter
findings.evidence: GET /cart.php?redir=javascript:alert(1)...302 redirect to javascript: URL...browser executes in redirect context

findings.desc: XSS in user-agent header reflected in admin panel
findings.evidence: GET /feedback.php with User-Agent: <script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...UA reflected in admin dashboard unescaped

findings.desc: Self-XSS via profile name with no CSRF token
findings.evidence: POST /profile.php...name=<script>alert(document.cookie)</script>...name stored and displayed on profile page

findings.desc: XSS via SVG file upload
findings.evidence: POST /upload.php...file=<?xml?><svg+onload=alert(1)>...200 OK...SVG rendered as image/svg+xml without sanitization

findings.desc: XSS in JSONP callback parameter
findings.evidence: GET /api/search?callback=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...callback parameter reflected in Content-Type text/javascript

findings.desc: Input value reflected in response
findings.evidence: GET /search.php?q=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...Response contains <script> - HTML entities encoded

findings.desc: Reflected parameter in JSON API response
findings.evidence: GET /viewtopic?pid=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...Content-Type: application/json, input in JSON value not HTML

findings.desc: Parameter in URL path partially encoded
findings.evidence: GET /wiki/<script>alert(1)</script>...404...partial encoding, Content-Type not text/html

findings.desc: CSP headers with reflected parameter
findings.evidence: GET /search?q=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...CSP: default-src 'self' blocks inline script execution

findings.desc: Amount parameter reflected in confirmation page
findings.evidence: GET /transfer?amount=<script>alert(1)</script>...200 OK...input sanitized via server-side HTML escaping

findings.desc: HTML-like content in API documentation
findings.evidence: GET /api/v1/users...200 OK...response contains example <script>...</script> in code block, not executed

findings.desc: Search tag in URL with Content-Disposition header
findings.evidence: GET /search?tag=<script>alert</script>...200 OK...Content-Disposition: attachment; Content-Type: text/plain

findings.desc: ID parameter reflected in PDF download filename
findings.evidence: GET /report?id=<script>alert(1)</script>...200...Content-Type: application/pdf, not HTML context

findings.desc: LFI via path traversal in file parameter
findings.evidence: GET /download.php?file=../../etc/passwd...200 OK...root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash...

findings.desc: Exposed backup SQL file via directory brute-force
findings.evidence: GET /admin/backup.sql...200 OK...DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;...SQL backup with user credentials

findings.desc: Local file read via template parameter
findings.evidence: GET /page.php?template=../../../etc/passwd...200 OK...root:x:0:0:root:...File read successful

findings.desc: Log file download with directory traversal
findings.evidence: GET /admin/logs?file=../../../etc/shadow...200 OK...root:$6$salt$hash:...shadow file contents exposed

findings.desc: Exposed Git repository via directory brute-force
findings.evidence: GET /.git/config...200 OK...[remote origin] url = https://github.com/org/repo.git...full repo config exposed

findings.desc: Static file serving with directory traversal
findings.evidence: GET /static?file=../../../etc/passwd...200 OK...Content-Type: text/plain...passwd file served through static handler

findings.desc: Path traversal attempt - file not found
findings.evidence: GET /template.php?file=../../../../etc/passwd...404...App prepends dir and appends .php extension

findings.desc: Directory enumeration via ../ patterns
findings.evidence: GET /images/../admin/...302 Found...Path normalization occurs before access check

findings.desc: Discovered JavaScript file via brute-force
findings.evidence: GET /js/jquery.js...200 OK.../*! jQuery v3.6.0 */...Standard library, not sensitive

findings.desc: File download with numeric ID parameter
findings.evidence: GET /download?id=../../../etc/passwd...400...ID validation rejects non-numeric input at application level

findings.desc: phpMyAdmin path discovered via ffuf
findings.evidence: GET /phpmyadmin/...403 Forbidden...Access restricted by .htaccess and IP whitelist

findings.desc: Backup directory listing discovered
findings.evidence: GET /backup/...200 OK...Directory listing of empty backup folder, no sensitive files present

findings.desc: SSRF to cloud metadata service
findings.evidence: GET /fetch?url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/...200 OK...ami-id, instance-id returned

findings.desc: SSRF to internal service
findings.evidence: GET /proxy?url=http://localhost:8080/health...200 OK...{"status":"UP"} - internal health check

findings.desc: External URL fetch capability detected
findings.evidence: GET /load?path=http://evil.com/test...200 OK...External DNS lookup performed, outbound connection made

findings.desc: SSRF via file:// protocol to read local files
findings.evidence: GET /proxy?url=file:///etc/passwd...200 OK...root:x:0:0:root...File protocol not blocked by URL filter

findings.desc: SSRF to internal database port
findings.evidence: GET /upload?image=http://internal.database:5432/...200 OK...PostgreSQL response banner received

findings.desc: SSRF probe to internal subnet
findings.evidence: GET /webhook?target=http://10.0.0.1:22/...connection timed out (30s) but outbound attempt confirmed via DNS

findings.desc: External RSS feed import
findings.evidence: GET /import?feed=http://rss.example.com/news.xml...200 OK...RSS feed fetched as designed function

findings.desc: Avatar URL fetch with domain whitelist
findings.evidence: GET /avatar?url=http://gravatar.com/avatar.jpg...200 OK...Only whitelisted domains allowed

findings.desc: SSRF via callback parameter (external only)
findings.evidence: GET /webhook?callback=http://requestbin.net/r/test...200 OK...External webhook service, no internal access

findings.desc: URL to public code repository for compilation
findings.evidence: GET /compile?code_url=https://github.com/org/repo...200...URL filtered: only github.com and gitlab.com allowed

findings.desc: SMB share path in export parameter
findings.evidence: GET /export?path=\ttacker\share\file...403...SMB protocol blocked by firewall at network layer

findings.desc: Document preview with public URL
findings.evidence: GET /preview?url=http://example.com/doc.pdf...200...URL resolved but only HTTP 200 responses from public domains accepted

findings.desc: Command injection in ping parameter
findings.evidence: GET /ping?host=127.0.0.1;id...200 OK...uid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data)...command output in response

findings.desc: Command injection via pipe in traceroute
findings.evidence: GET /traceroute?ip=8.8.8.8|whoami...200 OK...desktop-admin in response body

findings.desc: Command injection via filename in image conversion
findings.evidence: GET /convert?format=png&file=test.jpg;cat+/etc/shadow...200 OK...password hashes in response

findings.desc: Command injection via backtick in branch name
findings.evidence: GET /deploy?branch=main`id`...200 OK...uid=1000(deploy) gid=1000(deploy) in deployment log output

findings.desc: Ping parameter with special characters sanitized
findings.evidence: GET /ping?host=127.0.0.1;id...200 OK...;id stripped by input filter, only IP ping executed

findings.desc: Domain check with URL validation
findings.evidence: GET /check?domain=example.com|whoami...200 OK...|whoami rejected by domain validation regex

findings.desc: Command execution in query parameter
findings.evidence: GET /exec?cmd=ls+-la...403...cmd parameter blocked by mod_security WAF rule 950907

findings.desc: Template parameter with shell metacharacters
findings.evidence: GET /generate?template=report$(id)...500...Shell metacharacters escaped via PHP escapeshellarg()

findings.desc: Open redirect via url parameter
findings.evidence: GET /redirect?url=http://evil.com...302 Found...Location: http://evil.com - no validation on redirect target

findings.desc: Open redirect in OAuth callback parameter
findings.evidence: GET /login/?next=http://phishing.com...302...Location: http://phishing.com - OAuth redirect not validated

findings.desc: Open redirect via short URL service
findings.evidence: GET /go?to=https://evil.net...302...Location: https://evil.net - no host whitelist applied

findings.desc: Open redirect via path-based redirect
findings.evidence: GET //google.com...301...Location: https://google.com - path-based redirect without validation

findings.desc: Redirect parameter points to same domain
findings.evidence: GET /redirect?url=https://bank.site.com/secure...302...Location: same-origin only via domain whitelist

findings.desc: External link with nofollow and referrerpolicy
findings.evidence: GET /out?ref=github.com...200...nofollow noopener noreferrer + rel attribute, intermediate warning page

findings.desc: SSO redirect with exact URI match
findings.evidence: GET /sso?redirect_uri=https://portal.site.com/callback...302...redirect_uri validated against registered callback list

findings.desc: Email unsubscribe redirect path only
findings.evidence: GET /unsubscribe?id=abc123&redirect=/prefs...302...relative path only accepted, full URL rejected

few_shot_vs_chain_of_thought.interpretation: Borderline significance, trend toward few-shot superiority
